rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (multi-agent cooperation under partial observability and limited communication) and domain (multi-agent reinforcement learning in complex games) as the user's question, even though it focuses on the specific game of Hanabi rather than the "Gamma-World" framework directly.
